title: alnus subrotunda
intro: Alnus subrotunda, also known as the Korean mountain alder, is a species of flowering plant in the alder family. The bark and leaves of the plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alnus subrotunda are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Alnus subrotunda include teas, infusions, and extracts that are often used to treat various health conditions, such as hypertension and digestive issues.
